plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-181 RP05.P02.M09.S13-RP05.P04.M02.S07 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-181 adds a descriptor-only Matter Core API/interface and early UI state bridge over the CP00-178 service boundary and CP00-180 sensitive prechecks.

handoff.open_scope: Continue RP05.P04.M02.S08 onward UI secondary interaction, build smoke, and interface workflow implementation in CP00-182 without runtime persistence or Loop execution.
